videos.title: Jeep Steering.The Thing Between You and a Very Bad Day on Trail!
videos.description:
Your steering components are the one thing standing between you and a very bad day on trail. 

#JeepLife #JeepSteering #pschydroassist

So naturally most Jeep owners never think about them until something goes horribly wrong. In this episode Paul and The Ginger get serious about the part of your build that deserves a lot more attention than it's getting.

There are a lot of exciting things to spend money on when you're building a Jeep. Steering components are not one of them. Not right away at l

videos.title: This Trail Leads to New Mexico's Weirdest Town
videos.description: This adventure I'm in Truth or Consequences, New Mexico for two days of exploring on and off the trail. The first day runs the Rio Grande Trail north toward town, with side trips up to old mineshafts, a long shelf road, and one section that turned me around. The second day is spent walking the streets of one of the strangest small towns in America, a place that traded its name to a radio show in 1950, sits on top of geothermal hot springs the Apache held sacred for centuries, and still has a fad

videos.title: NEW Data Grid Control in Canvas Power Apps — Explained
videos.description:
The NEW Data Grid Modern Control in Canvas Power Apps is here — and this video is a full deep dive.

The Data Grid displays records in a column-and-row layout built on Fluent UI. You can connect it to data sources like SharePoint, Dataverse, or collections. It supports virtual scrolling for large datasets, optional search filtering, sortable columns, and selectable rows. Columns are configured as sub-controls and support multiple types including text, number, phone, email, URL, and button. Use i

videos.title: How To See HIDDEN DETAILS In Copilot Studio Transcripts
videos.description:
Today I’m gonna show you how to get full conversation transcripts for your agents in Copilot Studio. Including the hidden stuff.

That’s right the hidden stuff. Because the details you see over here in the activity tab, that’s only half the story. And many times important details are missing. The way we are going to do it is with this free, downloadable app. I vibe coded it with Power Apps and it allows you to easily review the transcripts in an environment.

Let’s take a look at the Copilot Stu

videos.title: APIs Made Easy in Power Apps (Use Any API + ParseJSON)
videos.description:
If APIs have ever felt confusing or out of reach, this is the video that changes that. You are going to learn how to call ANY API from Power Apps, return raw JSON, and turn it into clean, usable data using ParseJSON.

This walkthrough keeps things practical. You will start with a real example, use a Power Automate flow with the HTTP action, and then bring that data back into your canvas app. From there, you will break down JSON in a way that actually makes sense and use Power FX to shape it into

videos.title: Boot Camps: Training with Engineering Experts
videos.description:
Summary

The conversation covers the concept of boot camps as immersive learning experiences with leading engineering experts. It also highlights the value of interaction with engineering experts and the ability to ask in-depth questions during these events.

Takeaways

* Boot camps are three-day immersion events with leading experts in engineering.
* The value of boot camps lies in the interaction with engineering experts and the ability to ask in-depth questions.

videos.title: Why Agents Make Every Job a Startup
videos.description:
Agents are turning every job into a startup by unlocking an infinite backlog and enabling parallel 24/7 work. Consequences include exhilaration, new forms of burnout from judgment overload, and constraints from cost, evaluation, and audience absorption. Responses require new technical and coordination roles, pacing infrastructure, and leadership retooling toward prioritization and portfolio decisions.
